recommendations.title: Raymond & Ray
recommendations.overview: Half brothers Raymond and Ray reunite when their estranged father dies—and discover that his final wish was for them to dig his grave. Together, they process who they've become as men, both because of their father and in spite of him.

recommendations.title: Jungle Run
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister's journey into the jungle to find their missing father.

recommendations.title: DeVour
recommendations.overview: Friends become increasingly addicted to a video game that has an evil agenda.

recommendations.title: Empire Records
recommendations.overview: The employees of an independent music store learn about each other as they try to stop the store from being absorbed by a large chain.

recommendations.title: Jigoku
recommendations.overview: A group of sinners involved in interconnected tales of murder, revenge, deceit and adultery all meet at the Gates of Hell.

recommendations.title: The Wrecking Crew
recommendations.overview: Estranged half-brothers Jonny and James reunite after their father's mysterious death. As they search for the truth, buried secrets reveal a conspiracy threatening to tear their family apart.

recommendations.title: The Bad Batch
recommendations.genres: Action, Horror, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: After being exiled to a fenced-off wasteland, Arlen is kidnapped by a group of cannibals and goes on a journey to reunite a missing girl with her father.

recommendations.title: Devil's Gate
recommendations.overview: Set in the small town of Devil's Gate, North Dakota, the film examines the disappearance of a local woman and her young son. Schull plays an FBI agent who helps the local sheriff search for answers. Partnering with a deputy , they track down the miss

recommendations.title: The Love Witch
recommendations.overview: A modern-day witch uses spells and magic to get men to fall in love with her, with deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: In His Shadow
recommendations.overview: After the death of their father, two half-brothers find themselves on opposite sides of an escalating conflict with tragic consequences.
